name: Apple and Pork Curry
recipeIngredient: 1 x Freshly Ground Parsley or Coriander
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and slice the cooking apple. Seed and cut the red pepper into thin strips.
2. Heat oil in a heavy frypan over medium-high heat. Cook pork chops until browned on both sides and almost cooked through; remove from pan and set aside.
3. Cook onion, garlic, apple, and red pepper strips for 2 minutes or until softened.
4. Blend chicken stock with cornstarch; add to the pan along with curry powder, ground cumin, and cinnamon. Cook for 1-2 minutes until slightly reduced and thickened.
5. Return pork chops to the frypan. Adjust seasoning with salt and pepper. Cook for 1-2 minutes or until heated through.
6. Serve pork chops with sauce and sprinkle with fresh chopped parsley or coriander.
7. Serve with quick-cooking couscous flavored with chopped green onions and raisins. Serves 4.
